channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Netanyahu wants to phase out U.S. military aid | 60 Minutes
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu tell 60 Minutes he wants Israel to eventually stop relying on U.S. military aid: "It's time that we weaned o...

item.title: 5/10: Sunday Morning
item.description: Hosted by Jane Pauley. Featured: The Supreme Court ushers in a new era of gerrymandering; the legacy of CBS News Radio; motherless daughters; comedian...

item.title: WATCH: Five passengers are the first to leave the hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius
item.description: The passengers dressed in protective clothing and masks were escorted to the shore and expected to continue on flights back to their home countries.

item.title: Body of soldier who went missing in Morocco recovered, U.S. Army says
item.description: The Moroccan military recovered the body of one of two U.S. soldiers who went missing on May 2, the U.S. Army said.
